title: Conference roaming test uses metrics proxy instead of direct RPL/announce checks
description: Uses sim.metrics() and node counts as proxy for RPL route updates and announce propagation but no direct verification (e.g. no simulated CoAP/RPL DIO after movement, no rx_success counts checked per node). P2 improvement. Codereview pass 1 post-implementation.
close_reason: Replaced proxy metrics with direct AnnounceProcessor/GradientTable/RPL/DIO/CoAP verification post-roaming in test_500_node_conference. Backbone gateway coordination added. pytest passes with independent oracles.
